title: Exchange migration — status sync, Tuesday
description: Confirmed Sunday maintenance window with Kyle. Rollback plan is in the runbook, tested twice on the staging cluster.

title: Little League practice — Wolcott Park, Tue/Thu 5:30
description: Tomás cut a corner on the segmentation ticket. Reviewed with him — he'll re-run the change window with proper approvals.

title: CISSP study — Domain 3 review, weeknight
description: Patricia flagged that Marcus Jr. needs a signed permission slip by Friday. Signed and put on the counter.

title: DeShawn gaming — Wed/Sat 9:30 PM Discord
description: DeShawn crushed me twice tonight. Third game we called it — his kid was up early. Same time Saturday.

title: Sunday 2 PM call — Gloria
description: Falcons practice was tight. Two kids missing gloves; picked up spares from the equipment bin.

title: Family dinner — 6 PM, home
description: CISSP Domain 5 — access controls. Solid on the theory, thin on some of the practical bio scenarios.

title: Falcons game — Saturday, home field
description: Ribs on the Weber Saturday. Two-hour smoke, dry rub, no glaze. Kansas City sauce on the side.

title: Annual physical — fall check-in
description: Mom sounded fine on the 2 PM call. Harold's tinkering with the boiler again; I told her to leave it to Marino.
